name: Feed
description: The scrolling-stream card family. Two shapes ride the same column — `post` (the authored content card: channel header, body block, optional inline modules, engagement footer) and `ad` (the in-feed sponsored placement: brand row, optional headline + body, a hero + CTA slab, no engagement row). Editorial collections of popular posts ride alongside Feed cards via the [Section · Post Carousel](../section/post-carousel.md) sub of the Section family — that pair owns the curated-collection placement, not Feed itself. Both Feed shapes share the same container surface and padding rung so authored posts and sponsored placements tile cleanly side by side.
